conflict_reason: BRD requests prototype stack (Streamlit) but the portal is a 7-page UI-heavy patient-facing application with auth, booking flows, metrics, consultation management, and prescriptions. The BRD also states the app should 'feel like a real hospital client application' - a client-demo quality intent.
selected_stack_rationale: UI-heavy patient portal with 7 distinct page surfaces. Healthcare domain. Client-demo quality requested. Per genesis.stack.yaml production_profiles.nextjs_tailwind_shadcn_motion: use_for includes portal, healthcare, client_demo_polished.
